name: PINTEREST, INC.
summary: Pinterest, Inc. operates a visual discovery and inspiration platform where users find ideas related to their interests, tastes, and life moments. The platform is accessible via web and mobile applications, offering features such as a Save button and browser extensions. Pinterest monetizes primarily through advertising, offering advertisers tools to reach users. The company also operates Shuffles, a separate application. Pinterest serves users, advertisers, creators, and publishers globally.

products.name: Pinterest
products.description: Visual discovery and inspiration platform accessible via web and mobile for finding and saving ideas.

products.name: Shuffles
products.description: Separate Pinterest application distinct from the main MAU count.

products.name: Save Button
products.description: Browser extension allowing users to save content from across the web to Pinterest.

partnerships.description: Provider of the vast majority of Pinterest's compute, storage, data transfer, and other infrastructure services.
